message:
fix: correct websocket resilience test package path and pattern (#3459) (#3469)

The nightly websocket-resilience-test was failing because it looked for
WebSocket tests in pkg/api/handlers/ with pattern "TestWebSocket|TestHub|TestHandle",
but the actual WebSocket handler tests live in pkg/agent/ and are named
TestServer_HandleWebSocket_*. Update the go test invocation to target
the correct package and test name pattern.

Signed-off-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -112,7 +112,7 @@ echo -e "${BOLD}Go WebSocket handler tests:${NC}"
 
 WS_TEST_OUTPUT="$TMPDIR_WS/go-ws-tests.txt"
 WS_TEST_EXIT=0
-go test ./pkg/api/handlers/... -run "TestWebSocket\|TestHub\|TestHandle" -v -timeout 30s > "$WS_TEST_OUTPUT" 2>&1 || WS_TEST_EXIT=$?
+go test ./pkg/agent/... -run "TestServer_HandleWebSocket" -v -timeout 30s > "$WS_TEST_OUTPUT" 2>&1 || WS_TEST_EXIT=$?
 
 # Count pass/fail from Go test output
 GO_PASSED=$(grep -c "^--- PASS:" "$WS_TEST_OUTPUT" 2>/dev/null) || GO_PASSED=0
